summary: Security hardening: prevent prototype pollution in plugin lifecycle supervisor

details.vulnerability: Prototype pollution via user-controlled plugin names (__proto__, prototype, constructor)
details.fix: Object.create(null) for state storage, setPluginState() with key sanitization, auth gate on POST route
changes: State object uses null prototype (no prototype chain to pollute)
Plugin name validation: string, 1-100 chars, /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/ only
_load() filters dangerous keys from persisted state
lifecycle:manage added to admin and operator ROLE_MATRIX
details.regression_test: 11 security tests covering injection attempts, validation, and null prototype verification
